title: HTML Colors
content:
### HTML Colors Colors in HTML can be specified using **names**, **RGB**, **HEX**, **HSL**, or **RGBA** values. --- ### Color Formats | Format | Example | Description | |--------|---------|-------------| | **Color Name** | `red` | 140 named colors | | **HEX** | `#FF0000` | Hexadecimal (most common) | | **RGB** | `rgb(255, 0, 0)` | Red, Green, Blue (0-255) | | **RGBA** | `rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.5)` | RGB with Alpha (transparency) | | **HSL** | `hsl(0, 100%, 50%)` | Hue, Saturation, Lightness | --- ### Background Color ```html

Blue Background

Orange background (HEX)

``` --- ### Text Color ```html

Tomato colored text

Green text (RGB)

``` --- ### Border Color ```html

Violet border

``` --- ### Transparency with RGBA ```html

Semi-transparent tomato background

``` --- ### Standard Named Colors | Color Name | HEX Value | |-----------|-----------| | Red | `#FF0000` | | Blue | `#0000FF` | | Green | `#008000` | | Yellow | `#FFFF00` | | Black | `#000000` | | White | `#FFFFFF` | | Gray | `#808080` | | Orange | `#FFA500` | | Purple | `#800080` | > **Pro Tip:** Use a color picker tool or VS Code's built-in color picker to find the perfect color. `#` followed by 6 hex digits is the most common format.
codeExample:
Blue background, white text

Tomato text (RGB)

Orange border (HEX)

Semi-transparent green

quiz.question: Which format represents colors in HTML with #RRGGBB?
